phases.name: Golden Fixtures Baseline
phases.objective: Generate and lock deterministic Swift golden fixtures before any C++ parity work.
cursor_steps: Run governance validator and generation pipeline.
Generate fixture baselines from Swift tools.
Replay Tri/Tet Kuhn-5 fixture and lock measured/estimated/unknown baseline cases.
Store and hash-lock fixture artifacts.
Tag integration branch checkpoint phase-0-pass.

phases.name: TSDF Parity
phases.objective: Complete Track P TSDF migration with deterministic behavior and no Core impurity.
cursor_steps: Implement TSDF modules in delivery order.
Add TSDF↔Tet deterministic mapping assertions (index/decomposition parity contract).
Run parity fixtures and TSDF-specific tests.
Record benchmark and determinism evidence.
Tag integration checkpoint phase-1-pass.

phases.name: Evidence Parity
phases.objective: Port Evidence engine with byte-identical deterministic JSON and replay behavior.
cursor_steps: Migrate deterministic_json, ds_mass_function, admission_controller, replay_engine.
Extend evidence payload with Tri/Tet binding digest and cross-validation reason-code fields.
Replay Swift logs through C++ and compare hashes.
Archive report under governance/generated/reports/phase-2.
Tag integration checkpoint phase-2-pass.

phases.name: Merkle + Proofs
phases.objective: Finish inclusion and consistency proof stack with boundary vectors.
cursor_steps: Implement inclusion and consistency proofs (RFC 9162 style).
Extend Merkle leaf hashing contract to include Tri/Tet binding digest payload.
Run vector suites for tree-size boundaries.
Run cross-platform strict C++ toolchain validation.
Persist deterministic digest report.
Tag integration checkpoint phase-3-pass.

phases.name: TimeAnchoring + Cost Governance
phases.objective: Complete pure-computation time anchoring and deterministic cost governance (quota, pricing, rate policy) without network IO in Core.
cursor_steps: Implement parser/fusion/error-classification/proof assembly.
Integrate AetherBilling resource wallet metering and quota checks.
Implement CostShield policy kernel primitives (shadow pricing, GCRA, idempotency key generation).
Enforce client-first RFC3161 anchor policy (session start/end mandatory + 60s periodic) with mobile direct TSA path.
Validate deterministic outputs across platforms.
Store phase evidence and cost-policy fixtures in governance generated report.
Tag integration checkpoint phase-4-pass.

phases.name: Quality + System Integration Closure
phases.objective: Close known platform integration drifts (blur SSOT, PatchDisplayMap migration, upload hash verification).
cursor_steps: Unify blur constants and align code to registry values.
Replace ScanViewModel local snapshot with PatchDisplayMap chain.
Remove blur haptic path and keep frame rejection semantics.
Enforce expected_hash check in persist_chunk().
Tag integration checkpoint phase-5-pass.

phases.name: Track X V3 Foundations
phases.objective: Introduce V3 innovation set behind compile-time flags with default OFF.
cursor_steps: Implement V3 modules with explicit flag guards.
Keep Track P fixtures green.
Generate Track X-specific fixtures.
Tag integration checkpoint phase-6-pass.

phases.name: Track X V4 Foundations
phases.objective: Integrate V4 clusters and server-side cost governance enforcement (auth/rate/idempotency/runtime fuse).
cursor_steps: Implement V4 cluster modules behind flags.
Integrate three-gate server enforcement chain (Gateway + Scheduler/Worker) against shared policy contracts.
Run Track P regression and V4 fixtures.
Record schema bumps and migration notes.
Tag integration checkpoint phase-7-pass.

phases.name: CT-VIO + Noise + FrameGate
phases.objective: Start mobile-first offload with hard compliance and quality admission while preserving cloud final render path, and enforce first-scan success as top KPI.
deliverables: batch gate evidence logs for phase 8
cursor_steps: Batch 8A: implement on-device compliance/OOD/temporal vote/rule engine path with fail-closed behavior.
Immediately run required gates and full sweep (G-FULL-GATE-SWEEP) after Batch 8A; block progression on any failure.
Batch 8B: implement S5 precheck admission, keyframe selection, dedup, and blur/exposure admission metrics.
双通道上传策略-在线通道: 仅 S5素材 触发云端最终渲染队列优先上云，非S5留在本地继续采集.
Immediately run required gates and full sweep (G-FULL-GATE-SWEEP) after Batch 8B; archive diagnostics and thermal traces.
Tag integration checkpoint phase-8-pass.

phases.name: Burst + Uncertainty + Photometric
phases.objective: Shift geometric bootstrap to device side (VIO/local BA/scale/depth/uncertainty) to reduce cloud search space.
deliverables: on-device semantic scale anchor + depth prior + uncertainty maps
coarse TSDF/occupancy evidence for cloud warm start
cursor_steps: Batch 9A: deliver burst controller, VIO bootstrap, and local BA window optimization with deterministic replay.
Immediately run required gates and full sweep (G-FULL-GATE-SWEEP) after Batch 9A.
Batch 9B: deliver scale anchor, monocular depth prior, uncertainty maps, and coarse TSDF/occupancy updates.
Immediately run required gates and full sweep (G-FULL-GATE-SWEEP) after Batch 9B; persist diagnostics in governance reports.
Tag integration checkpoint phase-9-pass.

phases.name: Coverage + IG + UI Guidance
phases.objective: Complete on-device mesh/instance graph loop and evidence-only UI feedback while maintaining user intent neutrality.
deliverables: on-device MC33 coarse mesh + closure pre-estimate
TAIS instance split + incremental instance graph updates
cursor_steps: Batch 10A: implement MC33 extraction, closure ratio pre-estimate, and coverage stopper/info-gain feedback loop.
Immediately run required gates and full sweep (G-FULL-GATE-SWEEP) after Batch 10A.
Batch 10B: implement TAIS instance separation, incremental graph updates, and evidence-only UI rendering contract.
Immediately run required gates and full sweep (G-FULL-GATE-SWEEP) after Batch 10B; store integration report.
Tag integration checkpoint phase-10-pass.

phases.name: Noise-Aware Trainer + DA3
phases.objective: Add on-device GS warm-start and bounded trainer handoff while reserving cloud for final S5 optimization/render.
deliverables: on-device GS init + mini warm-up + DPC pre-stats
trainer handoff package with deterministic provenance
cursor_steps: Batch 11A: implement GS initialization, mini-splat warm-up, and DPC pre-statistics on device.
Immediately run required gates and full sweep (G-FULL-GATE-SWEEP) after Batch 11A.
Batch 11B: integrate noise-aware trainer handoff and enforce cloud-final-S5-only render contract.
Immediately run required gates and full sweep (G-FULL-GATE-SWEEP) after Batch 11B; write release readiness report.
Tag integration checkpoint phase-11-pass.

phases.name: DGRUT + 8x8 Texels + Native Resolution
phases.objective: Ship device-tier render prep, scheduler, thermal and memory control loops for stable high throughput.
deliverables: thermal + memory + battery scheduler control loops
performance profile evidence across supported tiers
cursor_steps: Batch 12A: integrate DGRUT/texel path, ROI hints, and per-tier render prep modules.
Immediately run required gates and full sweep (G-FULL-GATE-SWEEP) after Batch 12A.
Batch 12B: integrate thermal/memory/battery scheduler loops and adaptive fallback contracts.
Immediately run required gates and full sweep (G-FULL-GATE-SWEEP) after Batch 12B; record fps/memory/thermal evidence.
Tag integration checkpoint phase-12-pass.

phases.name: Streaming + Overlay + Final Orchestration
phases.objective: Finalize mobile-heavy streaming/audit packaging and certify cloud final S5 render + legal archive closure.
deliverables: on-device CAS/delta upload + provenance package stack
cloud final S5 render/audit archive handshake
phase13 scenario + full gate sweep reports
cursor_steps: Batch 13A: integrate CAS chunking, dedup, delta upload, and transport adaptation on device.
Immediately run required gates and full sweep (G-FULL-GATE-SWEEP) after Batch 13A.
Batch 13B: integrate Merkle/hash/provenance package, signature chain, and session-start/end + periodic audit anchors.
Immediately run required gates and full sweep (G-FULL-GATE-SWEEP) after Batch 13B.
双通道上传策略-终态通道: 最终会话提交时必须全量上传并对 S0-S5 素材全部接纳，不得因质量门禁拒绝剩余素材.
Batch 13C: integrate final orchestrator and enforce cloud final S5 render + legal archive closure path.
Immediately run required gates and full sweep (G-FULL-GATE-SWEEP) after Batch 13C; run scenario A/B/C/D and capture reports.
Close all blocked contracts before release tag.
Tag integration checkpoint phase-13-pass.

phases.name: Zero-Fab Core + Tri/Tet Fusion
phases.objective: Ship hardened zero-fabrication core policy, cross-validation fusion, fallback geometry correctness, and TRI/TET consistency layer as executable runtime contracts.
cursor_steps: Batch 14A: replace all fallback placeholder camera transforms with validated rigid inverse + fail-closed behavior.
Immediately run required gates and full sweep (G-FULL-GATE-SWEEP) after Batch 14A.
Batch 14B: integrate zero-fabrication policy kernel and dual-lane cross-validation fusion rules into runtime path.
Immediately run required gates and full sweep (G-FULL-GATE-SWEEP) after Batch 14B.
Batch 14C: integrate TRI/TET consistency engine and expose measured/estimated/unknown bindings for audit output.
Run G-TRI-TET-RUNTIME-CONSISTENCY and archive phase-14 Tri/Tet diagnostics.
Immediately run required gates and full sweep (G-FULL-GATE-SWEEP) after Batch 14C; archive phase report and tag phase-14-pass.
